key_insight: STORX is an open-source MATLAB framework that unifies shape and topology optimization in a modular object-oriented design, making advanced methods easier to learn, extend, and compare.
engineering_relevance: It gives researchers and students a transparent platform for testing optimization formulations, sensitivities, and constraints in computational design problems.
method: Implements parametric and level-set shape optimization.
Supports topology optimization via density, level-set, and topological-sensitivity methods.
Uses abstract base classes to plug in new objectives and manufacturing constraints without changing core code.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports software architecture and illustrative problems demonstrating how mathematical formulations map directly to executable code, but does not provide quantitative benchmark results.
watch_item: As a MATLAB-based educational framework, performance and scalability may depend on the chosen implementation details and may be less suited for large industrial-scale runs without further optimization.
paper_title: STORX: An Open-Source Object-Oriented Framework for Shape and Topology Optimization in MATLAB
